title: Triolet
content:
"I love you, my lord!"
        Was all that she said,
    What a dissonant chord,
    "I love you, my lord!"
    Ah! how I abhorred
        That sarcastic maid!
    "I love you? My Lord!"
        Was all that she said.
meaning:
"Triolet" is a quintessential example of Paul Thomas Gilbert's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
